description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows that runs on push events. The workflow has three jobs: clang-cl, msvc, and mingw-sdl. The clang-cl and msvc jobs run on a Windows 2022 environment, while the mingw-sdl job runs in a Fedora container on an ubuntu-latest environment. Each job checks out the code, caches CPM.cmake packages, and performs various build and test steps using CMake, Ninja, and MSVC or MinGW compilers.
